title: hymenophyllum undulatum
intro: Hymenophyllum undulatum, also known as the wavy cloak fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a delicately shaped fern with wavy fronds, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum undulatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, with herbal preparations often involving infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves.
